post.summary:
Create + post a debt-collection Phiếu Thu that settles the selected invoice
debts and credits the cash fund, atomically. Idempotent per
X-Idempotency-Key (the frontend always sends one).

Create + post a supplier-payment Phiếu Chi that settles the selected
supplier debts and debits the cash fund, atomically. Idempotent per
X-Idempotency-Key (the frontend always sends one).

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Filter to a single payment method (cash/bank_transfer/card).

200.description: Active payment accounts for the current branch.

get.summary: List items + stock tại 1 location (kể cả stock âm)

201.description: Đã thêm hàng hóa vào vị trí

post.summary: Bind hàng hóa vào vị trí (tạo stock_balance = 0 + PSL). Không ghi stock movement.
Xếp vị trí hàng hoá theo lô — tạo stock_balance = 0 + PSL cho nhiều cặp (item, location) trong 1 transaction.

delete.summary: Bỏ hàng hóa khỏi vị trí (chỉ cho phép khi tồn = 0)

parameters.description: Filter by item.is_active (Trạng thái kinh doanh).

parameters.name: isPosVisible
parameters.description: Filter by item.is_pos_visible (Trạng thái giao dịch).

parameters.name: stockState
parameters.description: Post-aggregate filter on SUM(quantity): IN_STOCK > 0, OUT_OF_STOCK = 0, NEGATIVE < 0, ALL = no filter.

parameters.name: movementFrom
parameters.description: Filter rows with last_movement_at >= movementFrom (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: movementTo
parameters.description: Filter rows with last_movement_at <= movementTo end-of-day (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key — same key + same body within 24h replays the original response without creating duplicates

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key

parameters.name: hideOffsetting
parameters.description: When true, return 1 aggregated row per item with totals + net direction

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by line status; use ALL to return every status. TRANSFERRED lines are always excluded — query stock_transfers via temp_warehouse_lines.transfer_id for that audit trail.

parameters.name: hideBalanced
parameters.description: Hide items whose totalW2s equals totalS2w. Requires hideOffsetting=true; otherwise 400.

info.title: ERP API
info.description: OpenAPI 3 document for the ERP API. Regenerate the web SDK: `pnpm openapi:generate` (API must be reachable). Machine-readable spec: GET /docs-json

code.description: Employee code, unique per organization (e.g. NV000002)

temporaryPassword.description: Temporary password set by the administrator; user is expected to change it on first login.

isActive.description: Whether the user can sign in. Defaults to true when omitted.

roleIds.description: Optional initial roles to assign on creation.

profile.description: Optional HR profile persisted alongside the user account.
HR profile to upsert. Provided child collections fully replace the existing set.

paymentAccountId.description:
The configured `payment_accounts` row this payment goes into — e.g. which bank
account a transfer landed in. The server validates the mapping belongs to the
actor's org + branch and matches `paymentMethod`, then derives the receiving COA
account; clients never send a COA account id directly.

Optional: when omitted the server falls back to the single account configured
for the method, and rejects the request if more than one exists.

payments.description: Payment lines. Empty array = full debt (requires a customer on the invoice).

points.description: Number of loyalty points to redeem against this invoice

originalInvoiceItemId.description: Required in REGULAR mode — points back to the original SALE invoice_item.

returnLines.description: Items being returned (direction=IN). Must reference original SALE lines.

newLines.description: New items being purchased (direction=OUT). Same shape as a normal SALE.

cashAccountId.description: Required when refundMethod = CASH AND no active drawer session is found.

receivableAccountId.description: Required when refundMethod = OFFSET against an original AR (debt) invoice.

creditLiabilityAccountId.description: Required when refundMethod = STORE_CREDIT (target liability GL).

creditExpiresAt.description: Optional expiry date for the issued store credit (ISO date).

payments.description: Payments — only required for EXCHANGE with netAmount > 0.

customerId.description: Mã / tên khách hàng — filter by customer UUID

purpose.description: Mục đích — free-text purpose written by user on the form.

plannedDate.description: Kiểm kê đến ngày — planned cutoff date chosen in the create dialog (date only, no time).

countedAt.description: Ngày + giờ kiểm kê thực tế — defaults to now() on create.

conclusion.description: Kết luận — conclusion text shown at the bottom of the form.

generatedReceiptId.description: IDs of the goods-receipt/goods-issue documents auto-generated by process().

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

reason.description: Nguyên nhân — reason text for the variance on this line.

countedAt.description: Ngày + giờ kiểm kê thực tế (ISO 8601)

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.
